name: Pecan Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the yeast, whole wheat flour, milk, salt, and corn oil in the breadmaker.
2. Add the toasted chopped pecans to the breadmaker.
3. Process on the white bread cycle.
4. Any nut can be substituted for pecans if desired.
5. If additional flour is needed, add it sparingly.
6. Oat flour can be used as a preservative to help extend the shelf life of the bread.
